fields.label: Granted Action Actor
fields.why: Some spells give the target or another subject a new action instead of giving the caster a repeat action.
fields.comment: Stores granted action actor for spell-granted actions. Purpose: Granted Action Actor exists so canonical prose, structured markdown, and runtime JSON do not silently disagree about who can use a granted action and what it activates. Populate it from canonical prose. It maps to runtime JSON path `effects[].grantedActions[].actor`. Use `not_applicable` when the spell has no granted action or this property does not apply.

acceptedValueNotes.caster: Use when the caster can use the granted action.
acceptedValueNotes.target: Use when the spell target can use the granted action.
acceptedValueNotes.summoned_entity: Use when a summoned or created entity can use the granted action.
acceptedValueNotes.affected_creature: Use when any currently affected creature can use the granted action.
acceptedValueNotes.not_applicable: Use when the spell does not grant an action.

log.why: Added for Dragon's Breath target-activated Magic action.

fields.label: Granted Action Name
fields.why: The runtime needs a stable action identifier rather than relying only on prose.
fields.comment: Stores granted action name for spell-granted actions. Purpose: Granted Action Name exists so canonical prose, structured markdown, and runtime JSON do not silently disagree about who can use a granted action and what it activates. Populate it from canonical prose. It maps to runtime JSON path `effects[].grantedActions[].action`. Use `not_applicable` when the spell has no granted action or this property does not apply.

acceptedValueNotes.not_applicable: Use when the spell does not grant an action.

log.why: Added for Dragon's Breath target-activated Magic action.

fields.label: Granted Action Type
fields.why: A spell-granted Magic action is mechanically different from a generic action label.
fields.comment: Stores granted action type for spell-granted actions. Purpose: Granted Action Type exists so canonical prose, structured markdown, and runtime JSON do not silently disagree about who can use a granted action and what it activates. Populate it from canonical prose. It maps to runtime JSON path `effects[].grantedActions[].actionKind`. Use `not_applicable` when the spell has no granted action or this property does not apply.

acceptedValueNotes.magic_action: Use when canonical prose says the granted action is a Magic action.
acceptedValueNotes.standard_action: Use when the granted action is an ordinary action without the Magic-action tag.
acceptedValueNotes.bonus_action: Use when the granted action costs a Bonus Action.
acceptedValueNotes.reaction: Use when the granted action costs a Reaction.
acceptedValueNotes.not_applicable: Use when the spell does not grant an action.

log.why: Added for Dragon's Breath target-activated Magic action.

fields.label: Granted Action Frequency
fields.why: The runtime needs to know whether the granted action is repeatable while the spell remains active.
fields.comment: Stores granted action frequency for spell-granted actions. Purpose: Granted Action Frequency exists so canonical prose, structured markdown, and runtime JSON do not silently disagree about who can use a granted action and what it activates. Populate it from canonical prose. It maps to runtime JSON path `effects[].grantedActions[].frequency`. Use `not_applicable` when the spell has no granted action or this property does not apply.

acceptedValueNotes.once: Use when the granted action can be used one time.
acceptedValueNotes.each_turn: Use when the granted action can be used on each eligible turn.
acceptedValueNotes.while_active: Use when the action remains generally available while the spell is active.
acceptedValueNotes.not_applicable: Use when the spell does not grant an action.

log.why: Added for Dragon's Breath target-activated Magic action.

fields.label: Granted Action Area Shape
fields.why: Some granted actions emit a shaped area, such as Dragon's Breath creating a cone.
fields.comment: Stores granted action area shape for spell-granted actions. Purpose: Granted Action Area Shape exists so canonical prose, structured markdown, and runtime JSON do not silently disagree about who can use a granted action and what it activates. Populate it from canonical prose. It maps to runtime JSON path `effects[].grantedActions[].areaShape`. Use `not_applicable` when the spell has no granted action or this property does not apply.

acceptedValueNotes.Cone: Use when the granted action creates a cone.
acceptedValueNotes.Line: Use when the granted action creates a line.
acceptedValueNotes.Sphere: Use when the granted action creates a sphere.
acceptedValueNotes.Cube: Use when the granted action creates a cube.
acceptedValueNotes.Cylinder: Use when the granted action creates a cylinder.
acceptedValueNotes.not_applicable: Use when the granted action has no area shape.

log.why: Added for Dragon's Breath target-activated Magic action.

fields.label: Granted Action Area Size
fields.why: A granted area action needs its numeric area size outside prose.
fields.comment: Stores granted action area size for spell-granted actions. Purpose: Granted Action Area Size exists so canonical prose, structured markdown, and runtime JSON do not silently disagree about who can use a granted action and what it activates. Populate it from canonical prose. It maps to runtime JSON path `effects[].grantedActions[].areaSize`. Use `not_applicable` when the spell has no granted action or this property does not apply.

acceptedValueNotes.not_applicable: Use when the granted action has no area size.

log.why: Added for Dragon's Breath target-activated Magic action.

fields.label: Granted Action Area Size Unit
fields.why: Area size needs an explicit unit for runtime use.
fields.comment: Stores granted action area size unit for spell-granted actions. Purpose: Granted Action Area Size Unit exists so canonical prose, structured markdown, and runtime JSON do not silently disagree about who can use a granted action and what it activates. Populate it from canonical prose. It maps to runtime JSON path `effects[].grantedActions[].areaSizeUnit`. Use `not_applicable` when the spell has no granted action or this property does not apply.

acceptedValueNotes.feet: Use when the granted action area is measured in feet.
acceptedValueNotes.miles: Use when the granted action area is measured in miles.
acceptedValueNotes.not_applicable: Use when the granted action has no area size unit.

log.why: Added for Dragon's Breath target-activated Magic action.

fields.label: Granted Action Effect Indices
fields.why: The granted action should point to the runtime effect packets it activates.
fields.comment: Stores granted action effect indices for spell-granted actions. Purpose: Granted Action Effect Indices exists so canonical prose, structured markdown, and runtime JSON do not silently disagree about who can use a granted action and what it activates. Populate it from canonical prose. It maps to runtime JSON path `effects[].grantedActions[].effectIndices[]`. Use `not_applicable` when the spell has no granted action or this property does not apply.

acceptedValueNotes.not_applicable: Use when there are no linked effect indexes.

log.why: Added for Dragon's Breath target-activated Magic action.

fields.label: Granted Action Prerequisites
fields.why: Some granted actions can only be used while a stated condition remains true, such as the target object still being within range.
fields.comment: Lists extra prerequisites that must be true before a spell-granted action can be used. Purpose: Granted Action Prerequisites keeps repeat-action restrictions out of prose-only descriptions. Populate it from canonical text that gates a later action on range, position, target state, or a similar condition. It maps to runtime JSON path `effects[].grantedActions[].prerequisites[]`. Use `not_applicable` when the spell has no granted action prerequisite.

acceptedValueNotes.target_object_within_spell_range: Use when the granted action can only be used while the original target object remains within the spell's range.
acceptedValueNotes.target_within_spell_range: Use when the granted action can only be used while the original creature or target remains within the spell's range.
acceptedValueNotes.not_applicable: Use when the granted action has no extra prerequisite or the spell grants no action.

log.why: Added for Heat Metal's repeat Bonus Action range recheck.
